title: People Changing Easter Trips from Dubai to Spain
summary: Many British holidaymakers are changing their Easter holiday plans because of a war near Dubai. They are moving away from Dubai and other places in the Middle East to safer and more familiar destinations. Travel companies say people are booking trips to Spain, Portugal, Italy, and the Caribbean instead. Flights to these places are filling up quickly. Some airlines have stopped flying to Dubai and nearby areas until June due to safety concerns. Experts warn that it might be hard to find available flights as many people are rebooking their trips. People want to go to places that feel safe and easy to reach, like Spain and Portugal.

background_read: Easter is a spring holiday when many people in the UK go on vacation. Dubai is a popular holiday spot in the Middle East, but a war nearby is making people feel unsafe. Travel companies help people book trips to different places like Spain, Portugal, and the Caribbean. When flights fill up, it means many people are booking them, so it might be hard to get a seat. Airlines sometimes cancel flights to keep passengers safe during conflicts.
Article_Structure: WHO: British holidaymakers and travel companies
WHAT: Changing Easter trips from Dubai to Spain and other safe destinations
WHERE: From Dubai and the Middle East to Spain, Portugal, Italy, and the Caribbean
WHY: Because of a war near Dubai making people want safer and more familiar places

perspectives.description: They report increased bookings to Europe and the Caribbean as people avoid the Middle East.
